title: Species & breeds
subtitle: Manage the catalog used when registering pets. Suggestions are usable immediately; you approve or reject them later.
confirm_delete_species: Delete species "{{name}}" and all its breeds?

suggestions.title: Pending requests
suggestions.hint: They are already usable in registration. Approve or reject (reject deactivates them).

species_panel.title: Species
species_panel.hint: Select one to see its breeds.
species_panel.empty_hint: Create the first species in the AlmaPet catalog.

breeds_panel.title: Breeds
breeds_panel.select_species_hint: Click a species on the left table to see its breeds.
breeds_panel.empty_hint: Add the first breed for this species.

form.species_description: It will be published immediately in the registration catalog.
form.breed_hint: Breed name as it should appear in the combobox.

delete.species_hint: All associated breeds will also be deleted.
